name: Team Management
description: Organization and team management for Team-tier users. Manage members, roles, invitations, and shared org content.

page_briefs.team-overview: Team summary page. KPI cards at top showing member count, active users, and content published. Below, a member list with avatar, name, role badge, and last-active date per row.
page_briefs.team-members: Full member management view. Search bar and role filter at top. Member rows below with avatar, name, email, role dropdown, and action buttons for remove/change-role. Invite button in the header.
page_briefs.team-content: Shared organization content grid. Card grid showing team-published content items with author avatar, title, type badge, and publication date.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
